notes: Converted the files subset of the Drive API v3 Discovery document. The googledrive adaptor uses the googleapis SDK: create -> files.create, get -> files.get, list -> files.list, update -> files.update (PATCH). Only the files resource (create/get/list/update) and its File/FileList schemas are modeled; permissions, comments, revisions, drives, and about endpoints are omitted as the adaptor does not call them.
